## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (tests added for new behavior)
- [ ] New checks have stable ids and an actionable `fix` message
- [ ] No new network calls in the core; nothing is uploaded
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] Regenerated `examples/sample-report.*` if the report format changed
